description_long: This is a compact, two-seater couch with a modern, geometric design and a deep burgundy color. The backrest is asymmetrical, featuring a stepped profile with two distinct sections, each with a slightly angled surface. The seat and backrest are accented by two small, square, light gray throw pillows, which contrast with the dark upholstery. The couch has broad, blocky armrests and sits on four short, rectangular legs, giving it a sturdy appearance. The upholstery appears smooth and slightly glossy, with subtle button tufting on the seat and backrest. The overall form is boxy and minimalist, suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or outdoor covered spaces.
description: A modern, burgundy two-seater couch with an asymmetrical backrest, blocky armrests, and two light gray throw pillows. The design is geometric and minimalist, with smooth, subtly tufted upholstery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full seat, asymmetrical backrest, two light gray throw pillows, and broad armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the thickness of the backrest, and the placement of the throw pillows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the stepped, geometric backrest and the solid, unadorned back panel.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the armrest, seat depth, and the side profile of the throw pillows.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two seat cushions and two backrest sections are integrated and slightly tufted; two small, loose, square throw pillows are placed on the seat.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Upholstery is solid burgundy with subtle button tufting on the seat and backrest; no visible decorative stitching or patterns.
attribute_leg_style: Legs are short, block-shaped, and exposed, appearing to be made of dark wood or a similar material.
attribute_armrest_design: Armrests are broad, straight, and rectangular, matching the couch's upholstery and height, with no visible padding or decorative features.
attribute_backrest_type: Backrest is high, divided into two asymmetrical, geometric sections, integrated and slightly angled, with subtle tufting.
